# Water Dispenser Repair Dubai

> Same-day, certified water dispenser and water cooler repair across Dubai and the wider UAE. A DED-registered, Dubai Municipality-approved company operating since 2003. Inspection from 90 AED, fixed quotes before work, genuine/quality-matched parts, and a 90-day repair warranty. Service hours: Monday–Sunday, 08:00–22:00. Phone/WhatsApp: +971 50 159 0802. Email: info@waterdispenserrepair.ae.

## Key facts
- Founded: 2003
- Coverage: Dubai (primary), Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Ajman
- Inspection/diagnostic fee: from 90 AED, with a fixed quote before any approved repair
- Warranty: 90-day repair warranty on workmanship
- Unit types serviced: top-load, bottom-load, countertop/table-top, floor-standing, pipeline/POU (point-of-use) plumbed-in water coolers, and dispenser-with-fridge models
- Common repairs: cooling/compressor faults, heating element & thermostat faults, leaks, weak or no water flow, pump faults, tap/switch faults, child-lock issues, filter/cartridge changes, UV-C systems, low-water alarms, noise and bad-taste fixes, gas refilling, deep cleaning and sanitizing

## Core pages
- [Home — Water Dispenser Repair Dubai](https://waterdispenserrepair.ae/): Overview of same-day repair service, pricing, problems fixed, FAQs.
- [About](https://waterdispenserrepair.ae/about/): Company history since 2003, registration, team, values.
- [Services](https://waterdispenserrepair.ae/services/): Full list of repair, gas refilling, cleaning and maintenance services.
- [Contact](https://waterdispenserrepair.ae/contact/): Booking form, phone, WhatsApp and email.
- [Blog](https://waterdispenserrepair.ae/blog/): Care and repair guides from Dubai technicians.
